fields.Root: The root directory in which all lights underneath it will be affected.
fields.ProcessDisabled: Whether to process lights that are not part of an active hiearchy or the component itself is disabled.
fields.TargetShadowType: The shadow type to set all lights to.
fields._tag: The slot tag that lights have to have under ``Root`` to be affected.
fields._intensityField: The intensity to set all lights under ``Root`` to.
fields._rangeField: The distance range to set all lights under ``Root`` to.

methods.SetShadowType: Handles when the shadow type is set in the dialog.
methods.ChangeIntensity: Handles when the intensity is changed in the dialog.
methods.ChangeRange: Handles when the range is changed in the dialog.
methods.Remove: Handles when the dialog asks to remove lights.
methods.Disable: Handles when the dialog asks to disable lights.
methods.Enable: Handles when the dialog asks to enable lights.
